---
title: ""
page-layout: full
engine: markdown
---

::: page-header
# Research
:::

::: jump-nav
[Current focus](#current-research-focus){.jump-link} [PhD papers](#phd-papers){.jump-link} [Supervisory team](#supervisory-team){.jump-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Current research focus {#current-research-focus}

My present research centres on school attendance problems and emotionally based school avoidance (EBSA) — the subset of school non-attendance driven by emotional distress. This forms the basis of my PhD by publication, which comprises three interlinked empirical papers.

```{=html}
<!-- PhD Timeline — reads from /data/timeline.json -->
<div class="tl-legend">
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot done"></span> Completed</div>
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot wip"></span> In progress</div>
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot todo"></span> Not started</div>
  <div class="tl-legend-item"><span class="tl-legend-dot goal"></span> Goal</div>
  <div class="tl-est-badge" id="tl-est-badge">
    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="5.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M8 4.5v4l2.5 1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
    <span id="tl-est-year"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="phd-timeline" id="phd-timeline">
  <p class="pub-loading">Loading timeline…</p>
</div>

<div class="tl-milestones-footer" id="tl-milestones-footer"></div>

<script>
(function() {
  const TOTAL_QS = 16;
  const PAPER_COLORS = { 1: 'var(--navy)', 2: 'var(--accent)', 3: '#2d7a4f', 0: 'var(--text-muted)' };
  const STATUS_COLORS = { done: '#2d7a4f', wip: '#c05a4a', todo: '#6b6560', goal: '#2d7aee' };

  function overallStatus(statuses) {
    const vals = Object.values(statuses);
    if (vals.every(v => v === 'done')) return 'done';
    if (vals.includes('wip')) return 'wip';
    if (vals.includes('todo')) return 'todo';
    return 'goal';
  }

  function dotSvg(status, size) {
    size = size || 7;
    const c = STATUS_COLORS[status];
    if (status === 'done') return `<svg width="${size+4}" height="${size+4}" viewBox="0 0 14 14"><circle cx="7" cy="7" r="6" fill="${c}" opacity="0.15"/><path d="M4 7.2L6.2 9.4L10 4.6" stroke="${c}" stroke-width="1.8" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>`;
    if (status === 'wip') return `<span style="width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;background:${c};display:inline-block;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px ${c}20;"></span>`;
    if (status === 'goal') return `<span style="width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px dashed ${c};display:inline-block;"></span>`;
    return `<span style="width:${size}px;height:${size}px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid ${c};display:inline-block;opacity:0.5;"></span>`;
  }

  function renderBar(activity, paperColor, container) {
    const entries = Object.entries(activity.statuses).map(([q,s]) => [parseInt(q), s]).sort((a,b) => a[0]-b[0]);
    const minQ = entries[0][0], maxQ = entries[entries.length-1][0];
    const left = ((minQ - 1) / TOTAL_QS) * 100;
    const width = ((maxQ - minQ + 1) / TOTAL_QS) * 100;

    const track = document.createElement('div');
    track.className = 'tl-bar-track';
    track.style.cssText = `left:${left}%;width:${width}%;background:color-mix(in srgb, ${paperColor} 15%, transparent);`;
    container.appendChild(track);

    entries.forEach(([q, sym]) => {
      const dotLeft = (maxQ === minQ) ? left + width/2 : left + ((q - minQ) / (maxQ - minQ)) * width;
      const dot = document.createElement('div');
      dot.className = 'tl-bar-dot';
      dot.style.left = dotLeft + '%';
      dot.innerHTML = dotSvg(sym, 8);
      container.appendChild(dot);
    });
  }

  async function init() {
    const container = document.getElementById('phd-timeline');
    const footerEl = document.getElementById('tl-milestones-footer');

    let data;
    try {
      const res = await fetch('/data/timeline.json');
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error();
      data = await res.json();
    } catch {
      container.innerHTML = '<p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;padding:1rem;">Could not load timeline.</p>';
      return;
    }

    const currentQ = data.currentQuarter;
    document.getElementById('tl-est-year').textContent = 'Est. ' + data.estimatedCompletion;

    // Build milestone lookup
    const milestoneMap = {};
    (data.milestones || []).forEach(m => { milestoneMap[m.quarter] = m; });

    // ── Quarter header ──────────────────────
    let headerHtml = '<div class="tl-header"><div class="tl-header-label">Activity</div><div class="tl-quarters">';
    for (let q = 1; q <= TOTAL_QS; q++) {
      const ms = milestoneMap[q];
      const cur = q === currentQ;
      headerHtml += `<div class="tl-q${cur ? ' is-current' : ''}">`;
      if (ms) headerHtml += `<span class="tl-q-milestone">${ms.label}</span>`;
      headerHtml += `Q${q}`;
      if (cur) headerHtml += '<div class="tl-q-marker"></div>';
      headerHtml += '</div>';
    }
    headerHtml += '</div></div>';

    container.innerHTML = headerHtml;

    // ── Paper sections ──────────────────────
    data.papers.forEach(paper => {
      const color = PAPER_COLORS[paper.id] || 'var(--text-muted)';
      const completed = paper.activities.filter(a => overallStatus(a.statuses) === 'done').length;
      const total = paper.activities.length;
      const pct = Math.round((completed / total) * 100);

      const section = document.createElement('div');
      section.className = 'tl-paper';

      // Header
      const header = document.createElement('div');
      header.className = 'tl-paper-header';
      header.innerHTML = `
        <div class="tl-paper-info">
          <div class="tl-paper-bar" style="background:${color};"></div>
          <div class="tl-paper-meta">
            <div class="tl-paper-label" style="color:${color};">${paper.label}</div>
            <div class="tl-paper-title">${paper.title}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="tl-paper-right">
            <span class="tl-paper-frac">${completed}/${total}</span>
            <div class="tl-paper-progress" style="background:color-mix(in srgb, ${color} 15%, transparent);">
              <div class="tl-paper-progress-fill" style="width:${pct}%;background:${color};"></div>
            </div>
            <svg class="tl-chevron" width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M4 6l4 4 4-4" stroke="var(--navy)" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="tl-gantt-summary"></div>
      `;

      // Render mini bars in summary
      const summaryEl = header.querySelector('.tl-gantt-summary');
      // Add current-Q line
      const curLine = document.createElement('div');
      curLine.className = 'tl-current-line';
      curLine.style.left = ((currentQ - 0.5) / TOTAL_QS * 100) + '%';
      summaryEl.appendChild(curLine);

      paper.activities.forEach(act => {
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.className = 'tl-mini-row';
        row.style.position = 'relative';
        renderBar(act, color, row);
        summaryEl.appendChild(row);
      });

      section.appendChild(header);

      // Activities (hidden by default)
      const activitiesDiv = document.createElement('div');
      activitiesDiv.className = 'tl-activities';
      activitiesDiv.style.display = 'none';

      paper.activities.forEach(act => {
        const os = overallStatus(act.statuses);
        const row = document.createElement('div');
        row.className = 'tl-activity';

        // Label
        const label = document.createElement('div');
        label.className = 'tl-activity-label' + (os === 'done' ? ' is-done' : '');
        label.innerHTML = dotSvg(os, 7) + ' ' + act.desc;

        // Gantt cell
        const cell = document.createElement('div');
        cell.className = 'tl-gantt-cell';

        // Grid lines
        for (let g = 1; g < TOTAL_QS; g++) {
          const gl = document.createElement('div');
          gl.className = 'tl-gridline';
          gl.style.left = ((g / TOTAL_QS) * 100) + '%';
          cell.appendChild(gl);
        }
        // Current Q line
        const cl = document.createElement('div');
        cl.className = 'tl-current-line';
        cl.style.left = ((currentQ - 0.5) / TOTAL_QS * 100) + '%';
        cell.appendChild(cl);

        renderBar(act, color, cell);

        row.appendChild(label);
        row.appendChild(cell);
        activitiesDiv.appendChild(row);
      });

      section.appendChild(activitiesDiv);

      // Toggle
      header.addEventListener('click', () => {
        const open = activitiesDiv.style.display !== 'none';
        activitiesDiv.style.display = open ? 'none' : 'block';
        header.classList.toggle('expanded', !open);
        header.querySelector('.tl-chevron').classList.toggle('open', !open);
      });

      container.appendChild(section);
    });

    // ── Milestone footer ────────────────────
    if (data.milestones) {
      footerEl.innerHTML = data.milestones.map(m =>
        `<div class="tl-milestone-foot"><div class="tl-milestone-foot-label">${m.label}</div><div class="tl-milestone-foot-full">${m.full}</div></div>`
      ).join('');
    }
  }

  init();
})();
</script>
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## PhD papers {#phd-papers}

:::::: paper-grid
::: paper-card
[Paper 1]{.paper-label}

### Systematic review

A [PROSPERO-registered](https://www.crd.york.ac.uk/PROSPERO/view/CRD420251089918){.prospero-badge} systematic review and narrative synthesis of interventions for emotionally based school avoidance, examining construct definitions, outcome operationalisation, and intervention targets.
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 2]{.paper-label}

### Longitudinal modelling

Examining how patterns of school attendance develop across childhood and early adolescence using large-scale Australian longitudinal cohort data (LSAC).
:::

::: paper-card
[Paper 3]{.paper-label}

### Population-level attendance

Exploring system-level patterns in school attendance and non-attendance using national education data, with attention to how administrative reporting shapes the visibility of EBSA.
:::
::::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Supervisory team {#supervisory-team}

::: supervisor-row
[Dr Daniel Zarate](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000){.supervisor-link} [Dr Vasileios Stavropoulos](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000){.supervisor-link} [Dr Taylor Brown](https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000){.supervisor-link}
:::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: about-section
[Publications →](publications.qmd){.about-link} [Reading List →](reading-list.qmd){.about-link} [Projects →](projects.qmd){.about-link}
:::
